2605.09544.title: TIDE-Bench: Task-Aware and Diagnostic Evaluation of Tool-Integrated Reasoning
2605.09544.paper_summary: Tool-integrated reasoning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language models with external computation, retrieval, and execution capabilities. However, the field still lacks a high-quality and unified evaluation benchmark, and existing TIR evaluations remain limited in dataset quality, task diversity, diagnostic comprehensiveness, and evaluation efficiency. In this work, we introduce TIDE-Bench, a holistic and efficient benchmark for evaluating TIR methods, featuring three key advantages. First, it provides diverse task settings, combining widely used mathematical reasoning and knowledge-intensive QA tasks with two newly designed tasks, namely the tool-grounded experimental design task and the dynamic interactive task, to probe models' abilities in complex tool invocation and multi-tool coordination. Second, TIDE-Bench adopts a comprehensive yet task-aware evaluation protocol, jointly measuring final answer quality, process reliability, tool-use efficiency, and inference cost across heterogeneous task settings. Third, TIDE-Bench constructs high-quality and discriminative evaluation sets by filtering low-discrimination instances from existing datasets, substantially reducing evaluation cost while focusing on more challenging samples. Extensive experiments on multiple foundation models and TIR methods reveal persistent bottlenecks in tool grounding, offering insights for future TIR research.
2605.09544.paper_summary_zh: 工具整合推理（Tool-integrated reasoning）已成為提升大型語言模型與外部計算、檢索和執行能力的有前景範式。然而，該領域仍然缺乏高品質且統一的評估基準，現有的工具整合推理評估在數據集質量、任務多樣性、診斷全面性和評估效率方面仍然有限。在本研究中，我們介紹了 TIDE-Bench，這是一個全面且高效的基準，用於評估工具整合推理方法，具有三個主要優勢。首先，它提供了多樣的任務設置，結合了廣泛使用的數學推理和知識密集型問答任務，以及兩個新設計的任務，即基於工具的實驗設計任務和動態互動任務，以探測模型在複雜工具調用和多工具協調方面的能力。其次，TIDE-Bench 採用了一種全面而又關注任務的評估協議，聯合測量最終答案質量、過程可靠性、工具使用效率和推理成本，涵蓋異質的任務設置。第三，TIDE-Bench 通過從現有數據集中篩選低區分度實例，構建高質量且具區分性的評估集，顯著降低評估成本，同時專注於更具挑戰性的樣本。在多個基礎模型和工具整合推理方法上的廣泛實驗揭示了工具基礎設施中的持續瓶頸，為未來的工具整合推理研究提供了見解。
2605.09544.author: Yize Li et.al.
2605.09544.authors: Yize Li, Junzhi Li, Jason Song, Chuxiong Sun, Rui Wang, Changwen Zheng
